title: I need to see other connected gmails while setting up an email automation

posts.author: Izzy (Israel Benson)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I need to be able to see other team members gmail when I’m setting up an email automation, Whenever I get to the email section on the email automations , I only see my gmail as the connected emails whereas I need the email to come from one of my team members which I have to connect his gmail to the automation but unfortunately, I can’t find it. Is there a solution to this?

posts.author: Lebogang (Mogatwe )
posts.cookedHtml: Yes i got already have a aip👉 lebogangmogatwe175@gmail.com is email i had used to open aip
